channel.title: Security on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Home

item.title: Mobuild Envuscator and Digitalis
item.description: Why I built Mobuild Envuscator and Mobuild Digitalis: two tools aimed at the same mobile security problem from different sides.

item.title: Designing Secure Authentication Systems
item.description: Architecture and operational guidance for building authentication systems that limit damage, detect compromise, and recover cleanly.

item.title: Modern Mobile Hardening
item.description: A lifecycle-based model for mobile security that treats the client as hostile and keeps trust anchored in backend policy.

item.title: Threat Modeling AI as an Engineering Coprocessor
item.description: How to treat AI as an untrusted engineering coprocessor and apply supply-chain-grade controls across the SDLC.

item.title: Friday Frida Hacking without the Why
item.description: A practical Frida walkthrough showing how rooted Android devices can intercept app behavior at runtime.

item.title: Man-in-the-Middle
item.description: A practical overview of MITM attacks, their network-layer mechanics, and the mitigations that actually matter.
